hooks.command: INPUT=$(cat /dev/stdin); CMD=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.tool_input.command'); BRANCH=$(git rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD 2>/dev/null || echo 'unknown'); case "$CMD" in *'git checkout -b '*|*'git switch -c '*|*'git switch --create '*) echo 'BLOCK: Do not create branches directly. Use the EnterWorktree tool or using-git-worktrees skill.' >&2; exit 2;; esac; case "$CMD" in *'--force-with-lease'*) ;; *'git push --force'*|*'git push -f '*) echo 'BLOCK: Bare force push not allowed. Use --force-with-lease.' >&2; exit 2;; esac; case "$BRANCH" in main) case "$CMD" in *'git push'*) echo 'BLOCK: You are on the main branch. You MUST enter a worktree before doing any work.' >&2; echo 'BLOCK: Use the EnterWorktree tool or the using-git-worktrees skill.' >&2; echo 'BLOCK: Do NOT try other tools to work around this.' >&2; exit 2;; *'git reset --hard'*) echo 'BLOCK: You are on the main branch. Cannot reset --hard here.' >&2; echo 'BLOCK: Use the EnterWorktree tool or the using-git-worktrees skill first.' >&2; exit 2;; *'git merge '*) echo 'BLOCK: You are on the main branch. Cannot merge here.' >&2; echo 'BLOCK: Use the EnterWorktree tool or the using-git-worktrees skill first.' >&2; exit 2;; esac; WRITES_FILE=false; case "$CMD" in *'>'*|*'tee '*|*'tee>'*) WRITES_FILE=true;; *'cat <<'*|*'cat >'*|*'cat>'*) WRITES_FILE=true;; *'sed -i'*) WRITES_FILE=true;; *'cp '*|*'mv '*|*'install '*) WRITES_FILE=true;; *'mkdir '*|*'touch '*) WRITES_FILE=true;; *'patch '*|*'dd '*) WRITES_FILE=true;; esac; if [ "$WRITES_FILE" = true ]; then echo 'BLOCK: You are on the main branch. ALL file modifications are blocked, including via bash.' >&2; echo 'BLOCK: Do NOT use cat, echo, printf, heredocs, tee, sed, cp, mv, touch, mkdir, or any shell trick.' >&2; echo 'BLOCK: You MUST use the EnterWorktree tool or using-git-worktrees skill to enter a worktree FIRST.' >&2; echo 'BLOCK: This is the ONLY way to proceed. No workarounds. No exceptions.' >&2; exit 2; fi;; esac

BRANCH=$(git rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD 2>/dev/null || echo 'unknown'); case "$BRANCH" in main) echo 'BLOCK: You are on the main branch. ALL file modifications are blocked.' >&2; echo 'BLOCK: You MUST use the EnterWorktree tool or using-git-worktrees skill to enter a worktree FIRST.' >&2; echo 'BLOCK: Do NOT try to circumvent this by using Bash, Write, cat, echo, or any other tool.' >&2; echo 'BLOCK: Only after entering a worktree can you modify files. No exceptions. No workarounds.' >&2; exit 2;; esac

BRANCH=$(git rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD 2>/dev/null || echo 'unknown'); case "$BRANCH" in main) echo 'BLOCK: You are on the main branch. ALL file modifications are blocked.' >&2; echo 'BLOCK: You MUST use the EnterWorktree tool or using-git-worktrees skill to enter a worktree FIRST.' >&2; echo 'BLOCK: Do NOT try to circumvent this by using Bash, Edit, cat, echo, or any other tool.' >&2; echo 'BLOCK: Only after entering a worktree can you modify files. No exceptions. No workarounds.' >&2; exit 2;; esac
